name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — how did we do?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks so much for coming in to see us at Bright Smile Dental. We know dental visits aren't always the highlight of anyone's week, so it genuinely means a lot that you trusted us with your care.

If you have 30 seconds, we'd really appreciate a short review. Honest feedback from patients like you is how other people find us when they're nervous about finding a new dentist — and it helps us keep making dental care feel less scary, one patient at a time.

Here's the link:
https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if something wasn't quite right during your visit, please just hit reply — we'd much rather hear about it directly so we can make it right.

Thanks again,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hey {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick follow-up: if you have 30 seconds, we'd really appreciate a short review. https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review — thank you!

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
